scripts.publish:major: cd packages/create-vibekit-app && pnpm build && pnpm version major --tag-version-prefix create-vibekit-app-v --no-git-checks && pnpm publish --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:minor: cd packages/create-vibekit-app && pnpm build && pnpm version minor --tag-version-prefix create-vibekit-app-v --no-git-checks && pnpm publish --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:patch: cd packages/create-vibekit-app && pnpm build && pnpm version patch --tag-version-prefix create-vibekit-app-v --no-git-checks && pnpm publish --no-git-checks
